page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Improved prediction of FAD binding sites using pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers.

A web server for predicting of FAD Binding Sites Using Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers.

During cellular respiration in general and electron transport chain in particular, flavin adenine dinucleotide (FAD) plays a vital role.
